UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the ElderCare Connect system, storing essential information and their assigned role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system (e.g., 'elderly', 'volunteer', 'admin').

matrixNumber.description: The official student matrix number for volunteers (e.g., 05DIT23F2000). (Optional for non-volunteers)

phone.description: The phone number of the user. (Optional)

address.description: The physical address of the user. (Optional)

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture. (Optional)

fcmToken.description: Token for Firebase Cloud Messaging notifications. (Optional)

notificationsEnabled.description: Whether the user has enabled push notifications.

largeTextEnabled.description: Accessibility setting to increase font size across the app.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

AssistanceRequest.title: AssistanceRequest
AssistanceRequest.description: Represents a request for assistance made by an elderly user or caregiver.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AssistanceRequest entity.

createdByUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this request. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N AssistanceRequest)

createdByName.description: The full name of the requester at the time of creation.

taskType.description: The type of task requested (e.g., 'Grocery', 'Transport', 'Tech Support', 'Other').

description.description: A detailed description of the assistance needed.

location.description: The location where the assistance is required.

urgencyLevel.description: The urgency level of the request (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High').

status.description: The current status of the request (e.g., 'Pending', 'Accepted', 'In Progress', 'Completed').

assignedVolunteerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who accepted and is assigned to this request. Null if not yet assigned. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N AssistanceRequest)

chatRoomId.description: Reference to the ChatRoom created for this assistance request once accepted. Null if no chat initiated. (Relationship: AssistanceRequest 1:1 ChatRoom)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the assistance request was created.

acceptedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was accepted by a volunteer. (Optional)

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was marked as completed. (Optional)

ChatRoom.title: ChatRoom
ChatRoom.description: Represents a specific conversation room between two users related to an assistance request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatRoom entity.

requestId.description: Reference to the AssistanceRequest this chat room is associated with. (Relationship: ChatRoom 1:1 AssistanceRequest)

participantUserIds.description: References to the UserProfiles participating in this chat (elderly user/caregiver and volunteer). (Relationship: ChatRoom N:N UserProfile)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chat room was created.

lastMessageAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent message in this chat room. (Optional)

lastMessageSnippet.description: A short snippet of the last message sent in this chat room, for display in chat lists. (Optional)

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents an individual message within a ChatRoom.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Message entity.

chatRoomId.description: Reference to the ChatRoom this message belongs to. (Relationship: ChatRoom 1:N Message)

senderUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who sent this message. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Message)

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

Rating.title: Rating
Rating.description: Represents a rating and feedback provided by an elderly user/caregiver for a completed assistance request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Rating entity.

requestId.description: Reference to the AssistanceRequest this rating is for. (Relationship: AssistanceRequest 1:1 Rating)

volunteerUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who was rated (the volunteer). (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Rating)

elderlyUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who provided the rating (the elderly user/caregiver). (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Rating)

ratingScore.description: The numerical score given to the volunteer (e.g., 1-5).

feedback.description: Textual feedback provided by the elderly user/caregiver. (Optional)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the rating was submitted.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. The document ID (`userId`) must match `request.auth.uid`. Includes the 'role' field for DBAC, which is critical for enforcing role-based access control throughout the application. Users can read/write their own profile; admins have full access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, matching Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Collection for assistance requests that are awaiting acceptance by a volunteer. Documents in this collection have a 'status' of 'Pending'. The `createdByUserId` field is denormalized for authorization independence. Volunteers can read; elderly users/caregivers can create their own; no `assignedVolunteerId` is present yet.

params.name: requestId
params.description: The unique ID of the assistance request.

definition.description: Collection for assistance requests that have been accepted by a volunteer and are currently in progress. Documents in this collection have a 'status' of 'Accepted' or 'In Progress'. The `createdByUserId` and `assignedVolunteerId` fields are denormalized for authorization independence. Only the created user, the assigned volunteer, or an admin can read/write these documents.

params.name: requestId
params.description: The unique ID of the assistance request.

definition.description: Collection for assistance requests that have been marked as completed. Documents in this collection have a 'status' of 'Completed'. The `createdByUserId` and `assignedVolunteerId` fields are denormalized for authorization independence. Only the created user, the assigned volunteer, or an admin can read these documents.

params.name: requestId
params.description: The unique ID of the assistance request.

definition.description: Top-level collection for chat rooms. Each document includes `participantUserIds` (an array of UIDs) denormalized for authorization independence for itself and its subcollection messages. Includes `requestId` to link to the related assistance request. Only users listed in `participantUserIds` can read/write.

params.name: chatRoomId
params.description: The unique ID of the chat room.

definition.description: Subcollection for messages within a specific chat room. Each message document includes `senderUserId` and crucially, it **denormalizes `participantUserIds` from its parent ChatRoom document** to ensure strict Authorization Independence for message access. Only `senderUserId` can create, and only users in `participantUserIds` can read.

params.name: chatRoomId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent chat room.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique ID of the message.

definition.description: Collection for ratings provided by elderly users/caregivers to volunteers. The `requestId`, `volunteerUserId`, and `elderlyUserId` fields are denormalized for authorization independence. Only `elderlyUserId` can create; `elderlyUserId`, `volunteerUserId`, or an admin can read.

params.name: ratingId
params.description: The unique ID of the rating.
